## Constants

<a id="class-song-constant-root-music-dir"></a>

**ROOT_MUSIC_DIR** = `"res://Music/Song Metadatas/"` [🔗](#class-song-constant-root-music-dir)

Song metadata resource used by LibreBox and DJ_Controller. Stores music metadata plus stream/waveform references for built-in and user-imported tracks. Root directory for built-in song metadata resources.

<a id="class-song-constant-user-song-metadata-dir"></a>

**USER_SONG_METADATA_DIR** = `"user://Music/"` [🔗](#class-song-constant-user-song-metadata-dir)

User-imported songs (Add Track on device) save .tres here so they persist on Quest/Android.

---

## Property Descriptions

<a id="class-song-property-song-title"></a>

`StringName` **Song_Title** [🔗](#class-song-property-song-title)

Song title shown in UI.

---

<a id="class-song-property-main-artist"></a>

[Artist](Artist%20Class.md#class-artist) **Main_Artist** [🔗](#class-song-property-main-artist)

Primary artist for this song.

---

<a id="class-song-property-guest-artists"></a>

Array[[Artist](Artist%20Class.md#class-artist)] **Guest_Artists** [🔗](#class-song-property-guest-artists)

Optional list of featured artists.

---

<a id="class-song-property-song-album"></a>

[Album](Album_Class.md#class-album) **Song_Album** [🔗](#class-song-property-song-album)

Album resource for this song. Singles can still use a same-name album resource.

---

<a id="class-song-property-song-genres"></a>

EGenre.E_ID3Genres[] **Song_Genres** [🔗](#class-song-property-song-genres)

Genre IDs describing this song. Done in Ints, use Int_to_Id3Genre_str() to get the Genre Display

---

<a id="class-song-property-audio-file"></a>

`AudioStream` **Audio_File** [🔗](#class-song-property-audio-file)

Playable audio stream asset for this song.

---

<a id="class-song-property-audio-file-path"></a>

`String` **Audio_File_Path** [🔗](#class-song-property-audio-file-path)

For user-imported songs (Add Local): path to the file under user:// so it persists. When set, get_audio_stream() loads from this path if Audio_File is null.

---

---

<a id="class-song-property-track-bpm"></a>

`float` **Track_BPM** [🔗](#class-song-property-track-bpm)

Base BPM value used by tempo/beat logic.

---

[m_notes_enum](Properties/Music%20Key%20Class.md#enum-emusickey-m-notes-enum) **Track_Key_Note** [🔗](#class-song-property-track-key-note)

---

[m_scales_enum](Properties/Music%20Key%20Class.md#enum-emusickey-m-scales-enum) **Track_Scale** [🔗](#class-song-property-track-scale)

`bool` **Attempt_Find_waveform**() [🔗](#class-song-method-attempt-find-waveform)

<a id="class-song-method-attempt-find-waveform-from-audio-file-path"></a>

`bool` **Attempt_Find_waveform_from_audio_file_path**() [🔗](#class-song-method-attempt-find-waveform-from-audio-file-path)

Attempts to load the generated \*_WAVEFORM.png from next to Audio_File_Path. This is useful for user-imported songs where Audio_File is null.

<a id="class-song-method-get-all-song-paths"></a>

`PackedStringArray` **Get_All_Song_Paths**()  [🔗](#class-song-method-get-all-song-paths)

---

<a id="class-song-method-try-delete-song-at-metadata-path"></a>

`Dictionary` **try_delete_song_at_metadata_path**(metadata_resource_path: `String`)  [🔗](#class-song-method-try-delete-song-at-metadata-path)

Deletes a user-imported song: the .tres metadata file, optional Audio_File_Path under user://, and a waveform PNG next to the audio if present. Built-in res:// library tracks are not removable at runtime.
